conversation.content:
Reconcile the following columns. Document has 10 pages. Sources are anonymous (A and B).

COLUMNS:

---
Column 1: OS Rate (%) | Overall | Treatment
Definition: What percentage of total patients in the experimental arm survived at the latest follow-up? If reported, include the rate (percentage) and any accompanying details. If multiple arms are reported, list each arm separately. Use 'Not reported' if missing.
  A: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document provides median OS in months and hazard ratios, but not overall survival rates as percentages for the treatment arm."
  B: value="Not reported" | page=None | modality=text | reasoning="The document provides median OS in months and Kaplan-Meier plots showing survival proportion over time, but not a specific OS rate as a percentage at the latest follow-up for the overall treatment arm."

---
